data: With a common vision, we developed a brand that is reflective of Revogen's innovative and high-quality products that help patients heal.
Made possible by the people thinking of other's need at the time of their loss

We've enjoyed a lengthy partnership with SummitTrek and consider it an honor to create tools for their coaching practice that bring lasting impact in the lives and businesses of their clients. We help communicate on their behalf by way of brand re-design, monthly workbooks, email newsletters, assorted print materials and websites. Summit is in the business of transforming and restoring lives and businesses to their original intended purpose and we love helping them do that.

Summit makes use of carefully curated quotes throughout their materials. When we recently re-designed their brand we made sure to identify a font that felt authentically hand written, to give the personal touch whenever short quotes are displayed.

We've created a comprehensive system of tools, worksheets, workbooks all with a simple minimalistic aesthetic. We never want the design to get in the way of the process or the meaningful exercises the user is experiencing.
One of the most impactful Summit offerings is the Life Planning Retreat. The weekend is an opportunity to Rekindle Your Passions. Discover Your Purpose and Live Differently.
our process is found in restoring leaders and organizations to their original intened purpose through coaching

Medical Solutions of Texas is a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Business (SDVOSB) that acts as the bridge between medical supply companies and the Department of Defense and VA hospitals. They have the connections and experience to help private companies sell their medical suplies and solutions to the government.

MSOT's lacked a brand, identity and website that looked legitimate in the eyes of the medical community or the military end user. So, we developed a brand that was inspired by stenciled and angular military lettering and logistics shipping containers. The brand uses a color palette sampled from camoflauge and carries with it that tactical "we get it done" mentality.
The lettering is distinctive, simple and no nonsense.

The MSOT website is a place for medical supply sales reps to understand how to sell to the government. Pages help the view understand how MSOT helps clarify a complex process. We featured "end users." The ultimate recipients of the  medical care offered and featured them over the lifetime of military service from new recruits, to growing families all the way up to retired and aging combat veterans.
Our websites are always designed and programmed with desktop, laptop, tablet and mobile experiences in mind.
putting while someone else holds a branded flag

After a life-changing experiencing at a Youth Peace Camp in Serbia, founder Shane Hanson knew his purpose was to create a non-profit that served Foster Youth through sports, mentorship, and training. Due to the deeply flawed foster care system,  many children who need safe and secure environments are left with a lack of structure and resources. Freedom Youth Foundation was created to help fill that gap along side a community of amazing volunteers and sponsors. They care for thousands of foster kids each year in California, Idaho and Mexico.
With a brand that has good standing within the communities they serve, it was important to honor the intent of FYF's original logo.
Once a concise look and feel was created, we quickly developed all collateral for their day-to-day operations, marketing, and events.
In a recent fundraising event, we donated our services to create branded and marketing materials for a golf tournament.
branded signs for each golf hole
hero image of putting with flag
A collection of branding and signage design work within the CRE Industry.

Below is a collection of projects that fall into the CRE category. From marketing websites to core signage to eblast campaigns, we've done every conceivable brand and design related project for a CRE asset. We have come in as early as the conception of project and helped with the naming portion of the asset's brand all the way through project completed and ongoing marketing.
Premier office space among the biggest names in entertainment.

Worthe Real Estate Group and Blackstone co-own a collection of thirteen office buildings in Burbank that total over 3,000,000 s.f. of office space. They have six unique brands, one of which is a 19-acre campus with it's own state of art movie screening theater. Our unique opportunity was to unify and market the portfolio of properties as a single collection named: The Burbank Portfolio.

The challenge was to create one voice for this collection of branded properties and market the city of Burbank to companies that want to be in the center of it all for their commercial real estate needs. As we dug in, it became apparent that Burbank was and is "the cradle of content creation" and some would arguably say is the entertainment capital of the world. Our first deliverable was a video that showcased The Burbank Portfolio and the city itself.
We developed the brand, video graphics and partnered with Aether Films on an incredibly short one-month timeline.
burbank overlook with "the burbank portfolio" and buildings labeled
The Burbank Portfolio: Premier office space among the biggest names in entertainment
The amazing team at Aether Films handled the video production. Photos: Cliff William

Each distinctive property within the Burbank Portfolio has it's own brand identity developed at some point over the last 40 years. Consequently, the brands don't work together as a visual system or side-by-side in a portfolio of properties under singular ownership. We created cohesion with a simplified type system and used color to help create distinction between each property.
flyers for different buildings within design system
The main website showcases all the properties and links to individual property sites for the purpose of marketing lease renewals.
Brands have a story worth telling
They deserve to be recognized, so we arm them with clear stories and compelling design that allows them to stand out and succeed.
With a vast portfolio encompassing all of Los Angeles County, we focused on clarifying The Burbank Portfolio story and show off each property's character within a well-designed system.
specific website spreads for each site
Each property has individual marketing needs. Our brochure system positions each building in a fresh way and highlights the specific amenities of each.
"Come be a part of it." page
women in gym with big poster of lats on the wall
Branding, signage, super graphics and a website for the portfolio of health clubs at specific properties.
FIT media studio etched in glass
bikes in front of bike on the wall
male bodybuilder poster on wall in gym
Prominent Culver City building gets a much needed make over.
one culver atrium with large sign
When Feng Shui is mandate you have to get creative.

Designing the interior signage for HBO's West Coast HQ was one of the more interesting projects because of the challenging design brief. The architect wanted us to satisfy the clients desire to incorporate Feng Shui through the use interior signage. We used the nine life forces grid of Feng Shui and overlaid it on the layout of the interior to create an integrated modular sign design system. Based on the quadrant the signage fell in, that was the color and Feng Shui symbol the sign received.

As an established force in the analytics industry, Alteryx wanted a headquarters that represented their global impact. Through carefully curated graphics, we designed signage for each themed level of the Irvine HQ that represented the various countries of their regional offices. This translated from jewel box meeting rooms to custom workspace signs, following the same linear theme with individual personalities and colors to distinguish each floor.
A straightforward beautiful presentation for a no-nonsense industry

Know your audience. ERP was crystal clear on who they were talking to and we helped them turn that knowledge into a clear and beautiful presentation. Their website needed to be straightforward and clear but still be compelling. Simple isn't easy but it's worth it for ERP.
Specialized Net Lease Industrial Real Estate Investor over cranes

LoneHollow Ranch (LHR) is a beautiful, Texas ranch and retreat property operated by Young Life in Utopia, Texas. Our engagement with LHR began as a consultation on how to position the ranch as a possible venue for retreats and celebrations.

LHR is occupied most of the summer and sporadically throughout the rest of the year, but goal was to position LoneHollow as a destination for student, adult and school retreats or even for weddings, big gatherings or a remote adventure camp. LoneHollow Ranch has it all and can accommodate groups from 50-500.
“Welcome to your home away from home.”
The headquarters building at LHR welcomes you with it’s distinctive pillars, which serves as inspiration in the letterform shape for the ranch’s logotype.
A galvanized on corten steel signage system was designed to help guests find their way around the sprawling ranch.
We created an easy to use, illustrated map to make simple sense of the the massive property. Simiplification and ease of use were the priority.

We developed a series of brochures and digital presentations that spoke directly to the specific needs of different customer types: Leadership Retreats, Celebrations, Adult Retreats and Student Retreats.

A testament to the transformational power of the place. LHR welcomes groups to have one of the most meaningful weekends or weeks of their lives. It was important to feature the beauty of the place along with the amenities and the flexibility that the ranch offers to serve a diverse customer base.
An elementary school with a simple mission: to build up the next generation of education.
From business cards to signage, we worked together to balance outlets of creativity while maintaining function and sophistication in the school environment.

For over 50 years, St. James’, a private elementary school located in Los Angeles, has been fostering a new generation of leaders that graduate with more than what they learned in the classroom. Our job was to develop a consistent visual language that spoke to the core of what it means to belong at St. James’. With such a vast array of touch points to be tackled, it allowed for each project to shine with a bit of its own personality.

Creating an inspiring space  was as important as a safe and welcoming environment for St. James’. Throughout the school we’ve created moments of inspiration that a derived from the school’s four pillars: wonder of childhood, academics, community, and spirituality.
love others and yourself wall sign
what do you think wall sign
Brand elements and colors used in the environment are consistently applied to printed materials for both parents and students.
A Fresh Face for the School Year
Launching soon, the new St. James’ website prioritizes the success of students by focusing on their four pillars to guide current and prospective families.
Off-the-shelf solutions weren't up to par for the elevated aesthetic of The Burbank Portfolio.
Returning to the office in the midst of COVID was difficult for everyone. The challenge for Worthe, and its properties within The Burbank Portfolio, was maintaining a first class experience.

When you google "COVID signage" and "Social Distancing Signage", you will quickly realize that isn't really sophisticated solutions that will match a high-end office environment. Worthe came to us to help create a system of custom temporary signage as well as a "Return to Work" playbook for tenants. Both deliverables needed to fit the brand we created for The Burbank Portfolio and communicate the commitment Worthe was making to their tenants.
A playbook for all 13 properties within The Burbank Portfolio. Subject matter included commitments to safety, tenant recommendations for a phased return plan.

All 13 Burbank Portfolio buildings required safety signage throughout the interior and exterior. Our design goal was to communicate clearly without gimmicks and develop a flexible system that would work in hundreds of specific scenarios throughout all properties.
When you look for a quick fix solution online, here's is what you find.
google search of loud, unispired signage
It was an easy decision for their team.
clean, designed, black and white covid signage
“We work hard and smart to deliver excellence to our clients.”
This system needed to be done quickly while still being thoughtful and flexible. We love a good challenge.
The Burbank Portfolio properties have a number of private health clubs available for tenant use. Custom social "fitnessing" signage was needed throughout.
A vision to give the new headquarters the feel of an inviting stylish hotel.
The design aesthetic of the Oprah Winfrey Network HQ can be described as "boutique hotel meets corporate office."

Environmental graphics were constructed with natural materials and unique touches. We designed the signage system to complement that aesthetic and in some cases blend into walls discretely. We chose the same oak used for the flooring and furniture, while balancing that warmth with a contemporary matte finish clear acrylic. The acrylic is back painted to match the wall color (hiding any unsightly mounting hardware). We collaborated with the Looking design studio, who oversaw the creative direction of the signage and HLW International, who led the overall interior design efforts.
We work hard and smart to efficiently deliver excellence to our clients.
With client's and executives flying in, the signs were paired with a vinyl printing system that OWN can manage, allowing them to be ready for any guest who may arrive with a matching nameplate.
wide shot of hub street corner
Catching your eye as you stroll around the block.

Catching sun in beautiful Santa Monica, Uppababy's new HUB was ready for their customers to stroll right in. The problem? It was difficult to notice their location or find their designated customer parking.

After visiting the site, we came up with a simple plan to help navigate customers right to their door. For those walking up, we placed a sign on a column facing the street, and an opaque vinyl to their door. On the south facing wall of the building, we placed a larger sign that can easily be spotted as cars drive by or pull up into the driveway. By placing signage in these location, customers will no longer feel lost reaching their destination.
We work hard and smart to deliver excellence to our clients.
We diligently reviewed all possible options so customers can have a positive experience from the moment they pull up to when they receive high quality service.
drawn image of a craft knife
We extended the sign program to the parking area so customers can easily find their parking spots.
7600 Broadway is the flagship property for Embrey Partners. It is home to premier office space and over 200 refined residences.
Embrey is in the business of “Creating Places Where People Want to Be.”

Embrey Partners is one of the nation's premier multi-family home builders. So when they broke ground on their corporate HQ, premier offices and refined living residences in the heart of San Antonio, they needed to put their best foot forward.

A hard cover and soft cover portfolio book was created to showcase the 53,000 s.f. of premier office space. These were created to reflect the quality of the space itself and given away to potential tenants for the space.

As the property was being finished, leasing began. In order to give prospective tenants an idea of the amenities and floor plans available, we created a system of floor plans and unit plans for the management leasing team, all based off of the architectural drawings.
Prepared for Eleni Cyprus | Reddoor Creative
